title: Autofill same date across multiple tasks
excerpt: For event planning project boards: I am using a general caster formula to take my event date and subtract XX # of days from that event date, to produce new column for DUE DATE.  But this means I have to put my event date…

posts.author: teriharper (Teri Harper)
posts.cookedHtml:
For event planning project boards: I am using a general caster formula to take my event date and subtract XX # of days from that event date, to produce new column for DUE DATE. But this means I have to put my event date down that one column in every task (for caster to run against it and make new due date each time). How can I autofill or repeat the date down the column to every task in that board?

BTW using General Caster and not formula function because function does not result in a DATE that can be seen on calendars, etc.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You should be able to select all the items and edit the date on one item and it changes all items (or up to I think 500 at a time). Just use the checkbox on the left of each item. Click first and shift+click the last.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Teri,

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood, but if you’re looking to bulk input a date for multiple items our batch actions might be the answer - this shouldn’t impact what you have set up with general caster, but let me know incase I might be off the mark here!

posts.author: teriharper (Teri Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: I knew I was missing something easy… new Monday user. Thank you!
